## Prometheus Metrics

| Name | Type | Help | Source |
|------|------|------|--------|
| active_workers | gauge | Current number of active workers processing jobs | [`internal/processor/metrics/metrics.go`](https://github.com/llm-d-incubation/batch-gateway/blob/ff6e498fde6b94df1e8781791eeaf3e39f964d3e/internal/processor/metrics/metrics.go) |
| batch_cancellation_total | counter | Total number of batch job cancellations | [`internal/processor/metrics/metrics.go`](https://github.com/llm-d-incubation/batch-gateway/blob/ff6e498fde6b94df1e8781791eeaf3e39f964d3e/internal/processor/metrics/metrics.go) |
| batch_job_e2e_latency_seconds | histogram | End-to-end job latency from submission to terminal state (completed, cancelled, expired, failed) | [`internal/processor/metrics/metrics.go`](https://github.com/llm-d-incubation/batch-gateway/blob/ff6e498fde6b94df1e8781791eeaf3e39f964d3e/internal/processor/metrics/metrics.go) |
| batch_request_generation_tokens_total | counter | Total generation tokens produced by batch inference requests. Only counted when the inference response includes usage data. | [`internal/processor/metrics/metrics.go`](https://github.com/llm-d-incubation/batch-gateway/blob/ff6e498fde6b94df1e8781791eeaf3e39f964d3e/internal/processor/metrics/metrics.go) |
